name: codex-task-light
description: A Codex plugin that shows turn state in the macOS menu bar.

interface.shortDescription: Show a red, yellow, or green menu bar light for Codex activity.
interface.longDescription: Codex Traffic Light uses bundled Codex Hooks plus a small macOS status item app to show when Codex is running, waiting, failing, or completing a turn.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me install and use Codex Task Light.
